description: Angular stack — Angular 22 standalone components + signals, typed Reactive Forms, TanStack Angular Query server-state (injectQuery/injectMutation — caching + dedup + invalidation), Zod 4 family.

deps.@angular/common: 22 (provides HttpClient + the stable httpResource; the query layer wraps HttpClient via firstValueFrom)
deps.@tanstack/angular-query-experimental: 5 (^5.101.0 — signal-native injectQuery/injectMutation; server-state cache + invalidation. Version-pinned: the Angular adapter ships under the -experimental name)
deps.rxjs: 7 (Angular peer dep; HttpClient observables bridged to promises via firstValueFrom)
deps.zone.js: 0.15 (default change-detection runtime; zoneless is a later opt-in)
deps.zod: 4 (^4.0.0 — same family as stack v3/vue1 so wire schemas match the react/vue packs)

bundler.comment: No in-browser playground bundling for angular packs yet (angular-frontend-plan.md defers playground preview — needs the Angular compiler in the VFS bundler), so no bundler policy beyond the defaults.
